_comment: Focused AgentBus preset (per ECO-4.84 / ECO-4.85) — a graph-os surface trimmed to the bus + reach tools only, so a bus-first session (any LLM) sees a tiny, unambiguous toolset and reliably picks graph_bus. The per-group gates <TAG>TOOL=false drop every other graph-os tool group; BUSTOOL/REACHTOOL keep graph_bus + graph_reach. Pair with the prompts/bus_coordinator.json system prompt.
